calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Off Calendar

Application For Prove-Up Date
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Shermans Travel Media, LLC,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Mobissimo, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,909.57
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,816.45
Attorney's Fees: $1,000
Costs: $509.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $52,235.02

Judgment signed in open court.
